mood: High-tech, secure, authoritative, cyberpunk, immersive HUD

rules.headings: Tracking-tight, high impact. E.g., text-4xl font-bold tracking-tighter.
rules.body: Clean legibility for reading instructions. text-base leading-relaxed.
rules.data: Uppercase for labels, tabular lining for numbers, tracking-widest for small overlines.

layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6
layout_spacing.padding_scale: p-4, p-6 for standard cards; p-8 for wizard containers
layout_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment. Data left-aligned, status indicators right-aligned in list rows.
layout_spacing.borders: 1px solid border-cyan-500/20 for default glass panels. Status colored borders for active violations.

surface_styles.tracing_beam_active: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:border before:border-transparent before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-[#00E5FF] before:to-[#B14CFF] before:opacity-50 before:mask-border

components.navigation: Sticky top bar, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#05060B]/80 border-b border-[#00E5FF]/20. Logo on left, user profile and server connection status on right.
components.wizard_steps: Circular progress nodes. Active node glowing neon cyan text and border, completed nodes violet.
components.video_grid: Aspect-video container for student feeds. Overlay name and status label in JetBrains Mono. Border color maps to status (Green=OK, Red=Violation).
components.sparkline_charts: Use Recharts with transparent backgrounds, cyan or violet stroke colors, and drop-shadows on the lines to simulate glow.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-semibold hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_#00E5FF]. Secondary: border border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/10.

motion_interaction.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px], increased shadow glow intensity, border color brightens.

icons_assets.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Neon cyan color for active icons.

logo.description: AccessGuard futuristic glowing shield with eye logo

background_texture.description: Dark cyberpunk hexagonal grid with subtle cyan/violet glowing nodes
background_texture.placement: Login page background, Empty state dashboard background (opacity 20%)

student_id_template.placement: Student verification flow - placeholder for ID upload step

live_feed_examples.description: Student illuminated by screen in dark room
live_feed_examples.placement: Invigilator dashboard live video feed placeholder
Invigilator dashboard live video feed placeholder 2

accessibility_testing.contrast: Ensure text over neon backgrounds meets 4.5:1. Avoid using pure #000000; stick to the tinted void_black #05060B.
accessibility_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='create-session-wizard').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for dense dashboard icons.
Install recharts for sparklines/heartbeat charts on the invigilator dashboard.
Use framer-motion for smooth transitions of wizard steps and modal overlays.
Implement glassmorphism heavily as per surface_styles.
For typography, configure Tailwind config to use Unbounded for sans/headings, Inter for body, JetBrains Mono for mono.
Ensure the layout matches a dark mode cyberpunk HUD aesthetic exclusively. Do not build light mode.
